---
title: "Publications"
page-layout: full
---

<style>
.pub-entry {
  border-left: 3px solid #007bc2;
  padding: 1rem 1.25rem;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
  background: #F6F5F3;
  border-radius: 0 6px 6px 0;
}
.pub-venue {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  color: #757883;
  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
  font-family: 'Economica', sans-serif;
}
.pub-title {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.3;
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
  color: #222;
}
.pub-links {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  margin-top: 0.75rem;
}
.pub-link {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.4rem;
  padding: 0.3rem 0.75rem;
  border: 1px solid #007bc2;
  border-radius: 4px;
  color: #007bc2;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s;
}
.pub-link:hover {
  background: #007bc2;
  color: white;
  text-decoration: none;
}
</style>

<div class="pub-entry">
<div class="pub-venue">HCI-E 2025 · 4th Eurasian Conference on Human-Computer Interaction</div>
<div class="pub-title">TRedDil — Revealing Systematic Language Bias in LLM Safety</div>
<div class="pub-links">
<a class="pub-link" href="https://github.com/safenlp/TRedDil" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub</a>
<a class="pub-link" href="https://github.com/safenlp/TRedDil/blob/main/assets/TRedDil__Revealing_Systematic_Language_Bias_in_LLM_Safety.pdf" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Paper</a>
<a class="pub-link" href="https://github.com/safenlp/TRedDil/blob/main/assets/HCI-E2025-treddil-5Dec-Presentation.pdf" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-easel2"></i> Slides</a>
<a class="pub-link" href="https://hci-e.com/images/HCI-E2025%20BoA.pdf" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-book"></i> Book of Abstracts</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="pub-entry">
<div class="pub-venue">5th International Informatics and Software Engineering Conference (IISEC)</div>
<div class="pub-title">Evaluating LLM Performance on CWE Identification and CVSS Estimation</div>
<div class="pub-links">
<a class="pub-link" href="https://github.com/safenlp/iisec2026-llm-vulnerability-eval" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub</a>
<a class="pub-link" href="https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/11418496" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-journal-bookmark-fill"></i> IEEE</a>
</div>
</div>
